repo_signals: L3 smoke for platform.monitoring: PromQL with rate increase and histogram_quantile, recording versus alerting rules, Alertmanager routing grouping and inhibition, SLI SLO and error budget, dashboard design, label cardinality control, scrape config, alert fatigue and actionability
fix a Vue reactivity bug in the form

retrieval_query: prometheus promql rate increase histogram_quantile recording rule alerting rule alertmanager routing grouping inhibition slo sli error budget label cardinality scrape config grafana dashboard

validation_smoke.name: platform.monitoring L3 validation smoke
signals: alert maps to a documented human action
rate() applied to a counter over an adequate window
recording rule precomputes the expensive query for dashboards
label cardinality stays within the TSDB budget

diagnosis_smoke.name: platform.monitoring diagnosis smoke
signals: alert storm from no grouping or inhibition rules
rate() over a window shorter than the scrape interval returning gaps
histogram_quantile on non-cumulative buckets giving wrong percentiles
label cardinality explosion from a high-cardinality label
SLO burn-rate alert that never fires or always fires
